leadText: Verdant Cavern (Japanese: 茂みの洞窟 Verdant Cavern) is a location on Melemele Island in Alola, located in the northeastern portion of Route 2. It is the location of the trial of Ilima.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Moon and Pokémon Ultra Moon, when the Totem Raticate appears, Gumshoos 's cry is played instead of Raticate's.
